title: NostalgicRadio
description: Add a radio to your game that will take you back in time with nostalgic melodies! This mod includes a radio that plays slightly modified soundtracks from games like Minecraft, Undertale, Fallout, Silent Hill.
body:
Add a radio to your game that will take you back in time with nostalgic melodies! This mod includes a radio that plays slightly modified soundtracks from games like Minecraft, Undertale, Fallout, Silent Hill.

Who is this mod for?
If you miss the music of the past or want to add a cozy retro atmosphere to your game, this is a good choice! Turn on "Nostalgic Radio" and enjoy.

In the future, we plan to add a radio signal system, add various radio-related events, make it so that players can insert their own music and add more playing soundtracks



Version: 1.0

used soundtracks:
▶C418 - Haggstrom - Minecraft Volume Alpha
▶C418 - Wet Hands - Minecraft Volume Alpha
▶C418 - Subwoofer Lullaby - Minecraft Volume Alpha
SMORT
▶A1 - It's just a burning memory
▶Old Doll, mad father
▶Fallen Down
▶Fallout 1 Soundtrack - Maybe - by the Ink Spots**
